description:
Update single Manpower Log.

#### See - [Daily Log guide](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/daily-logs) - for additional info on
* Attachments
* Locations

parameters.name: run_configurable_validations
parameters.description: If true, validations are run for the corresponding Configurable Field Set.

num_hours.description: Number of hours for each worker

position.description: Position in which this entry was recorded for the day

status.description: Is a log pending or approved

vendor.description: This key is available when Contact is a Vendor

user.description: This key is available when Contact is a User

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Location
Timestamp of last update to Trade

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition

value.description: The value of the custom field

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition

value.description: The value of the custom field

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition

value.description: The value of the custom field

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition
Data type of the Custom Field Definition

400.description: Can not update due to errors

403.description: User does not have right permissions

date.description: Date of inspection. Mutually exclusive with the datetime property.

datetime.description: Datetime of record. Mutually exclusive with the date property.

num_hours.description: Number of hours for each worker

contact_id.description: ID of the Vendor that is performing work

user_id.description: ID of the User that is performing work. Use this instead of contact_id when tracking hours for a specific user.

location_id.description: The ID of the Location of the Manpower Log. `location_id` takes precedence over `mt_location`

trade_id.description: ID of the Trade associated to the Manpower Log

mt_location.description: Use this for creating a new multi-tier or single-tier Location. This will be ignored if `location_id` is provided.

items.description: Look at Daily Log Guide for more info.

custom_field_%{custom_field_definition_i.description:
Value of the custom field. The data type of the value passed in corresponds with the data_type of the Custom Field Definition.
For a lov_entry data_type the value passed in should be the ID of one ...

attachments.description:
Manpower Log Attachments.
To upload attachments you must upload the entire payload as `multipart/form-data` content-type and
specify each parameter as form-data together with `attachments[]` as files.

items.description: Look at Daily Log Guide for more info.
